Operation 'delete-/automation/v4/flows/{flowId}' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description provides important context about irreversibility and support contact, but lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved description adds: (1) explicit input requirements (workflow ID parameter), (2) expected HTTP response (204 No Content), (3) comprehensive side effects (removal of data, configurations, history), and (4) a precondition warning about active workflows. These additions help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and potential consequences before execution.

data.current_description: Fully delete a workflow by ID. Deleted workflows cannot be restored via the API. If you need to restore an accidentally deleted flow, you'll need to contact support.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a workflow by its ID. This operation cannot be undone through the API—deleted workflows must be restored by contacting support. Requires the workflow ID as a path parameter. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion. All associated workflow data, configurations, and execution history will be removed. Ensure the workflow is not actively running before deletion.
data.reasoning: The current description provides important context about irreversibility and support contact, but lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved description adds: (1) explicit input requirements (workflow ID parameter), (2) expected HTTP response (204 No Content), (3) comprehensive side effects (removal of data, configurations, history), and (4) a precondition warning about active workflows. These additions help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and potential consequences before execution.

message: Operation 'get-/automation/v4/flows/email-campaigns' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Retrieve workflow emails' is ambiguous - unclear if retrieving email templates or sent emails. Description lacks clarity about required parameters and response structure. Added context about parameter requirements, response content, and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve emails sent by a workflow by ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve emails sent by a workflow
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all emails sent by a specific workflow. Requires the workflow ID as a parameter. Returns a collection of email campaign records including delivery status, recipient information, and timestamps. Use this operation to audit email activity or retrieve campaign performance data for a workflow.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Retrieve workflow emails' is ambiguous - unclear if retrieving email templates or sent emails. Description lacks clarity about required parameters and response structure. Added context about parameter requirements, response content, and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'get-/automation/v4/flows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is concise and clear. Description is too minimal - lacks information about pagination support, query parameters, and response structure. Enhanced description includes parameter context and use cases to improve AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve all workflows from an account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all workflows from an account. Supports pagination and filtering via query parameters. Returns a collection of workflow objects with metadata including workflow ID, name, status, and creation timestamp. Use this operation to list available workflows or discover workflow IDs for further operations.
data.reasoning: Summary is concise and clear. Description is too minimal - lacks information about pagination support, query parameters, and response structure. Enhanced description includes parameter context and use cases to improve AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'post-/automation/v4/flows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is overly terse and lacks critical details about request structure, response content, and workflow state after creation. Added information about required/expected inputs, response structure, and initial workflow state to enhance AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Create a new workflow in the account. Accepts a workflow definition including name, triggers, actions, and configuration. Returns the created workflow object with assigned workflow ID and metadata. The workflow is created in a draft state and must be published before it can execute.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is overly terse and lacks critical details about request structure, response content, and workflow state after creation. Added information about required/expected inputs, response structure, and initial workflow state to enhance AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'put-/automation/v4/flows/{flowId}' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is minimal. Missing details about what can be updated, response structure, and important side effects regarding published workflows. Enhanced description includes input context, response information, and critical side effect about republishing requirements for AI agents to understand the full operation impact.

data.description_suggestion: Update an existing workflow by ID. Accepts a workflow update request with modified configuration, triggers, or actions. Returns the updated workflow object. Note: Updates to published workflows may require republishing to take effect. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is minimal. Missing details about what can be updated, response structure, and important side effects regarding published workflows. Enhanced description includes input context, response information, and critical side effect about republishing requirements for AI agents to understand the full operation impact.
